mapper.update: UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET id_verified_yn = #{idVerifiedYn}, ci_value = #{ciValue}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}
UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET applicant_snapshot = #{applicantSnapshot, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}

UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET version_id = #{versionId}, payment_snapshot = #{paymentSnapshot}, linked_account_id = #{linkedAccountId}, card_password_hash = #{cardPasswordHash}, application_status = 'REQUESTED', applied_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT version_id FROM CARD_VERSIONS WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND version_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND application_status != 'DRAFT' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT check_app_id FROM CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS WHERE application_status = 'DRAFT' AND created_at < SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' - INTERVAL '7' DAY
